info.name: USCIS FOIA Request and Status API
Submit FOIA or Privacy Act Request

items.docs: Create a new Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) or Privacy Act (PA) request for Alien File material. The request can be submitted about or on behalf of the subject of record. A unique Request Number is returned upon successful creation, which can be used to track the request status.

params.name: requestNumber
params.description: The FOIA request number returned when the request was submitted. Format: USCIS-YYYY-NNNNNN

items.docs: Check the current status of a submitted FOIA or Privacy Act request using the Request Number returned when the request was created. Returns the current processing status and any available updates.
